first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the core reasoning for the low score—the candidate's critical lack of the required C++ experience—is stated consistently and forcefully in both evaluations. All other differences in the strengths and concerns are minor paraphrases or slight shifts in emphasis that fall within the scope of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the substantive assessment of the candidate's qualifications.
